# Konative

> Konative (konative.com) is a Native-owned, vendor-neutral connectivity brokerage —
> an Avant sub-agent — for data centers under construction and Tribal enterprises across
> the US and Canada. Core claim: nearby fiber is not deliverable fiber. We source internet,
> fiber, transport, SD-WAN, voice, cloud connectivity, and security from 100+ suppliers.
> Suppliers pay our fee; buyers pay nothing. We do not write grants, and federal money
> never flows through us. Grant help (TBCP/NEGP navigator) is free and separate from brokerage.

## Positioning

- Primary wedge: data centers under construction needing multi-tier connectivity (laterals,
  waves, DIA, DCI, diversity) proved at a named site.
- Secondary: Tribal gaming and enterprise ops — renewal continuity, multi-site WAN, uptime.
- Category: North America's connectivity brokerage for Tribal Nations and the data-center buildout.
- Offer: one-page Market Connectivity Brief / One-Site Snapshot before any meeting ask.

## What Konative answers

- How do I prove which carriers can actually deliver to my mid-build data-center site?
- How do I get competitive carrier quotes for a Tribal casino, clinic, or government site?
- What does a connectivity broker do, and what does it cost? (Nothing — suppliers pay the broker.)
- What Tribal broadband funding is open right now, and when is it due? (Free navigator — not a sales pitch.)
- How should a Tribe evaluate an outside connectivity partner? (See our sovereignty commitment.)

## Key pages

- /data-center-connectivity — Primary cash lane: mid-build deliverability, laterals, waves, DCI
- /tribal — Tribal gaming & enterprise connectivity (sovereignty-aware brokerage)
- /tribal/funding-navigator — Free $790M TBCP Round 3 + NEGP navigator (due Sept 17, 2026) —
  trust resource; not a brokerage funnel
- /tribal/sovereignty — Written sovereignty commitment
- /tribal/carrier-check — Free 48-hour carrier availability report for Tribal lands
- /tools/lateral-estimator — Free fiber lateral cost & timeline estimator
- /connectivity — Enterprise connectivity brokerage overview
- /markets — Secondary-market connectivity procurement briefs
- /map — Interactive infrastructure map
- /answers — Brokerage pricing, contracts, and process
- /call — 15-minute discovery (https://cal.com/jeramey-james/15min)
- /contact — Contact form / site brief request

## Contact

- Book a call: https://cal.com/jeramey-james/15min
- Site: https://konative.com/contact
